creator: shawn.wallbridge@imaginaryforces.com
text:
After looking at it, and having someone else look at it. I think something
is actually deallocating too many mbufs, as the number 'allocated' is
_almost_ 2^64 each time.

I have uploaded the crash files here.

www.wallbridge.net/crash/

shawn
